title: Amtech E0510 13mm (1/2") Wood Chisel with Soft Grip
availability_text: Only 10 left in stock (more on the way).
features: DURABLE: This 13mm (1/2") wood chisel has a hardened and tempered chrome vanadium steel blade for durability
VERSATILE: With a soft grip handle for comfort, it has a bevel edge pattern and a tough metal striking cap and is ideal for any DIY woodworking application
SIZE CAPACITY: 2 inch range ideal for household and trade applications
SMOOTH OPERATION: Engineered to deliver consistent performance
PLUMBING APPLICATIONS: Essential for household and trade pipework
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning Yes Box Contains 1x Chisel See more
